title: ochnella ndellensis
intro: Ochnella ndellensis, also known as the 'Golden Cat's Claw', is a flowering plant species within the family Ochnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ochnella ndellensis include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling its roots and leaves in water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
